---
title: "Kairosis: A method for dynamical probability forecast aggregation informed by Bayesian change-point detection"
date: 2025-06-25
author: ["Zane Hassoun", "Niall MacKay", "Ben Powell"]
publication: "International Journal of Forecasting"
categories: ["Statistical Methods"]
url_source: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0169207025000299
url_preprint: 
journ: "International journal of forecasting"
issue: 1
volume: 42
page: 112-125
year: 2025
image: image.png
editor: 'source'
---
